messages.message:
Hi,
Thanks for asking.

We offer a full range of commercial-grade Pilates equipment, including the following Reformer systems:

嗨，
感谢您的提问。

我们提供全套商用级别的普拉提设备，包括以下改革器系统：

Standard Core Reformers – classic studio models
标准核心 reformers——经典工作室型号
Wooden Reformers (maple / oak / beech options)
木质 reformers（枫木/橡木/桦木选项）
Aluminum Reformers – modern, low-maintenance
铝制 reformers——现代，低维护
Foldable Reformers – space-saving, studio-capable
可折叠 reformers——节省空间，适合工作室
Reformer with Tower / 3-in-1 systems – Reformer + Tower (optional Cadillac functions)
带塔式/三合一系统——Reformer + 塔式（可选卡迪拉克功能）
Megaformer / Sculpt-style Reformers – long-frame, high-resistance models designed for strength & sculpt classes
Megaformer / 塑形式 Reformer——长框架、高阻力型号，专为力量与塑形课程设计

All models are designed for commercial studio use, with different configurations depending on space, training style, and intensity.

If you’d like, I can share the full catalog or narrow it down to the most suitable models based on what you’re looking for.

所有型号都专为商业工作室使用设计，根据空间、训练风格和强度不同而有所差异。

如果您需要，我可以分享完整目录，或根据您的需求筛选最合适的型号。
